title: KAWAHA 81/40L-1P Long Shackle Keyed Padlock (Waterproof, Solid Brass Lock) for Sheds, Storage Unit, School, Gym Locker, Fence, Toolbox, Hasp, Storage - 40mm L*1
features: 🔒 [HEAVY DUTY LOCK] Solid brass lock body and hardened steel shackle for maximum corrosion protection during outdoor or indoor use.
🔏 [HIGH SECURITY] 5-pin cylinder and dual locking lever construction provides excellent pry and cut resistance, which is much safer than 4-pin cylinder.

🔐 [HIGH QUALITY & STURDY STRUCTURE] Durable padlock is weather proof and designed for multiple uses and is to be one of the best padlock with keys in the market. With high strength zinc alloy body, hardened steel shackle and internal mechanisms, padlock is heavy duty but still in compact size.
🔓 [WIDELY APPLICATION]: Great for indoor or outdoor use. Ideal for storage units, garages, trailers, mobile trucks, outdoor gates, warehouses, moving trucks, fences, tool boxes etc.
🔑 FREE Shrink Tube for further shackle protection from rusting. Package Content: One padlock with three keys.
description: Product Description A Life Full of Solutions KAWAHA is focused on delivering good quality products and services purposed to build on the idea of better living through convenience, enhanced experiences and affordability. KAWAHA 81 Series Brass Keyed Padlock Solid brass body for maximum strength, reliability and corrosion resistance Shackle with 0.8 in. (20mm) wide internal space is made of hardened steel, offering good resistance to cutting and sawing 5-pin cylinder and dual locking lever construction provides excellent pry and cut resistance, which is much safer than 4-pin cylinder Specification Size : lock length 2.6 in. (65mm) * lock width 1-9/16 in. (40mm)* lock thickness 0.6 in. (14mm) Shackle thickness : 1/4 in. (6 mm) Weight : 155g Shackle Material : Hardened Steel Shackle With high strength zinc alloy body, hardened steel shackle and internal mechanisms, padlock is heavy duty but still in compact size.
